tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Things fall apart[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
And time breaks your heart[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I wasn't there but I know[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
She was your girl[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
You showed her the world[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]DM7[/ch]
But fell out of love and you both let go[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
She was crying on my shoulder[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
All i could do was hold her[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]DM7[/ch]
 Only made us closer until july[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Now I know that you love me[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
You dont need to remind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                    N.C.
I should put it all behind me[/tab]

Shoudn't I?


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]DM7[/ch]
But I see her[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
In the back of my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]C#7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
All the timeee[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]DM7[/ch]
 Like a fever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
Like I'm burning alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Like a sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]DM7[/ch]
Did I cross the line[/tab]

[ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]DM7[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
Well, good things don't last[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
And life moves so fast[/tab]

I'd never ask
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]DM7[/ch]
Who was better[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]
Cause she couldn't be[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
More different from me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]DM7[/ch]
Happy and free in leather[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
And I know that you love me[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
You dont need to remind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I wanna put it all behind me[/tab]

but, baby


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]DM7[/ch]
But I see her[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
In the back of my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]C#7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
All the timeee[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]DM7[/ch]
 Like a fever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
Like I'm burning alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Like a sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]DM7[/ch]
Did I cross the line[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
You say no one knows you so well[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]
But everytime you touch me, I just wonder how she felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Valentines day crying in the hotel[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know you didnt meant to hurt me so i kept it to myself[/tab]


[Chorus]

And i wonder
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Do you see her in the back of your mind?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#7[/ch]
In my eyes?[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
You say no one knows you so well[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#7[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
But everytime you touch me, I just wonder how she felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Valentines day crying in the hotel[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know you didnt meant to hurt me so i kept it to myself[/tab]
